record.field: Construction Developer: Update Product Category Cost Nature

# Simple, 1 level check to facilitate creating new subcategories. We don't support more complex operations for record in records: record['x_cost_nature'] = record.x_cost_nature or record.parent_id.x_cost_nature
Construction Developer: Initialize Sales Order Line Sequence on Sales Order create

for record in records: sequences = record.order_line.mapped('sequence') if len(sequences) != len(set(sequences)): # not all different: create order new_sols = [] for sol_i, sol in enumerate(record.order_line): previous_same_sequences = sum(seq == sequences[sol_i] for seq in sequences[:sol_i + 1]) # Handle duplicates by adding fractional offsets which will be used to order the list new_sols.append((sol.id, sol.sequence + (previous_same_sequences / sequences.count(sol.sequence)))) seqs = {sid: i for (i, (sid, _)) in enumerate(sorted(new_sols, key=lambda soltup: soltup[1]))} # Associate each sid with its sequence (order) when sorted else: # all different: use existing order seqs = {sol.id: i for (i, sol) in enumerate(sorted(record.order_line, key=lambda sol: sol.sequence))} # Associate each sid with its sequence (order) when sorted for sol in record.order_line: sol['sequence'] = seqs[sol.id] + 1
Construction Developer: Update Progress Increment on Quantity Increment change
record['x_progress_increment'] = record.x_quantity_increment / record.product_uom_qty if record.product_uom_qty > 0 else False
Construction Developer: Update Quantity Increment on Progress Increment change
Construction Developer: Update Quantity Increment on section button click

lines = record.order_id.order_line.sorted(key=lambda sol: sol.sequence) i = [sol.sequence for sol in lines].index(record.sequence) + 1 while (i < len(lines) and ((record.display_type == 'line_section' and lines[i].display_type != 'line_section') or (record.display_type == 'line_subsection' and (lines[i].display_type not in ['line_subsection', 'line_section'])))): if lines[i].x_is_deliverable: increment = min(lines[i].product_uom_qty - lines[i].qty_delivered, lines[i].product_uom_qty * record.x_progress_increment) # ensures the total doesn't exceed lines[i].product_uom_qty percentage = increment / lines[i].product_uom_qty if lines[i].product_uom_qty else False lines[i]['x_quantity_increment'], lines[i]['x_progress_increment'] = increment, percentage i += 1 record['x_progress_increment'] = 0 action = {'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'soft_reload'}

for sol in records: sol.write({'qty_delivered': sol.qty_delivered + sol.x_quantity_increment, 'x_quantity_increment': 0, 'x_progress_increment': 0}) action = {'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': {'message': "Delivered quantities updated.", 'type': 'success', 'next': {'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'soft_reload'}}}
Construction Developer: Generate Remark Reference on Create
Construction Developer: Write Remark Stages on Create or Write
Construction: Work Item - Set Work Item name
Construction: Work Item - Set unit cost and unit price from product
Construction: Work Item - Update related wi lines on product cost/price change
Construction: Work Item - Update product cost
Construction: Work Item - Update product price
Construction: Work Item - Update margin on price change if margin is fixed
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_margin'] = (wi.x_unit_price - wi.x_unit_cost) / wi.x_unit_cost if wi.x_unit_cost > 0 else False
Construction: Work Item - Update price on margin/cost change if margin is fixed
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = wi.x_unit_cost * (1 + wi.x_unit_margin)
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = sum(line.x_unit_price * line.x_quantity for line in wi.x_work_item_line_ids)
Construction: Work Item - Set as template
Construction: Work Item - Create new product for work item

for wi in records: new_product = env['product.product'].create({ 'name': wi.x_name, 'default_code': wi.x_reference, 'type': 'service', 'service_policy': "delivered_manual", 'list_price': wi.x_unit_price, 'standard_price': wi.x_unit_cost, 'uom_id': wi.x_unit_custom_id.id, }) wi.write({'x_product_id': new_product.id})
Construction: Work Item - Create/modify work item on sale order line
Construction: SOL - Create associated Work Item
Construction: SOL - Open SOL Work Item
Construction: Product - Archive Old Work Item Template
env['x_work_item'].search([("x_active", "!=", False), ("id", "not in", records.ids), ("x_product_id", "in", records.x_product_id.ids), ("x_is_template", "!=", False)]).write({'x_active': False})
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List (from Purchase Order)
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List (from Vendor Bill)
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List
Construction Developer: Compute Cost Nature Analysis

# NB: apparently SQL queries are not counted as maintenance lines
# Since a simple server action executed only once in e.g. ir_model_post.xml to # drop the db after model creation (and not check its type every time this server action runs) # does not work on the runbot for some reason, do the following instead # Ask Postgres what the type of 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report' currently is env.cr.execute(''' SELECT relkind FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report' ''') result = env.cr.fetchone() # fetch the result of the query that was just executed
# Drop the physical TABLE Odoo auto-created (no _auto = False in XML model) when creating the model # We need this code to create this model as a VIEW and not a TABLE (auto-created) # 'r': ordinary TABLE, i.e. not a VIEW ('v') if result and result[0] == 'r': env.cr.execute('DROP TABLE x_cost_nature_analysis_report CASCADE')
# action called from a project: fetch the records from the project # action called from a sale order: passed in the context as active_ids so_ids = (env.context.get('active_ids') if not (project_id := env.context.get('project_id')) else env['sale.order'].search([('project_id', '=', project_id)]).ids) or [0]
action = { 'name': "Cost Nature Analysis", 'view_mode': 'list', 'res_model': 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'context': {'view_id': 'view_x_margin_report_analysis_list', 'search_default_group_by_cost_nature': True, 'search_default_group_by_category': True, 'search_default_group_by_product': True }}
# skip the query if there are no sale orders if so_ids != [0]: # Format the Python list into a valid SQL tuple string # e.g., [1, 2] becomes "(1, 2)" and [1] becomes "(1)" so_ids_sql = tuple(so_ids) if len(so_ids) > 1 else f"({so_ids[0]})"
# Actual logic env.cr.execute(f''' CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW x_cost_nature_analysis_report AS ( WITH raw_data AS ( SELECT sol.order_id AS x_so_id, wil.x_work_item_id AS x_work_item_id,
COALESCE(wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_quantity, -- COALESCE looks at WIL first; if it's NULL (no work item), it uses SOL. COALESCE(wil.x_product_id, sol.product_id) AS x_product_id, COALESCE(wil.x_cost_nature, sol.x_cost_nature) AS x_cost_nature, COALESCE(wil.x_category_id, sol.x_category_id) AS x_category_id, COALESCE(wil.x_unit_price * wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.price_unit * sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_total_price, COALESCE(wil.x_unit_cost * wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.purchase_price * sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_total_cost,
COALESCE(wil.x_quantity * (wil.x_unit_price - wil.x_unit_cost) * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.product_uom_qty * (sol.price_unit - sol.purchase_price)) AS x_margin,
CASE WHEN wil.x_work_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN (wil.x_unit_price - wil.x_unit_cost) / NULLIF(wil.x_unit_price, 0) ELSE (sol.price_unit - sol.purchase_price) / NULLIF(sol.price_unit, 0) END AS x_margin_percent FROM sale_order_line sol LEFT JOIN x_work_item_line wil ON sol.x_line_work_item_id = wil.x_work_item_id WHERE sol.display_type IS NULL AND sol.product_id IS NOT NULL AND sol.order_id IN {so_ids_sql} ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS id, *, -- take everything from the previous table
-- Individual Margin / Total Margin of all rows x_margin / NULLIF(SUM(x_margin) OVER (), 0) AS x_margin_share,
-- Individual Cost / Total Cost of all rows x_total_cost / NULLIF(SUM(x_total_cost) OVER (), 0) AS x_cost_share
FROM raw_data)''')
# add active_ids to the context of the action action['context']['active_ids'] = so_ids

action = env['ir.actions.actions'].with_context(active_id=(p_id := record.x_wbs_project.id))._for_xml_id('project.act_project_project_2_project_task_all') action['context'] = {'active_id': p_id, 'default_project_id': p_id, 'default_user_ids': [env.uid]} # By default it fetches the default gantt view, so we have to specify this one gantt_view = env.ref('project_enterprise.project_task_dependency_view_gantt', raise_if_not_found=False)
# Select the gantt view by default action['views'] = [(gantt_view.id if gantt_view else False, 'gantt')] + [v for v in action.get('views', []) if v[1] != 'gantt']
Construction Developer: Update Analytic Account and Delete WBS Project on Task Project change

for record in records: sol = record.sale_line_id or record.x_sale_line_id project = (so := sol.order_id).x_wbs_project if project and not env['project.task'].search_count([('project_id', '=', project.id)]): project['account_id'] = False so['x_wbs_project'] = False project.unlink() so.message_post(body=f"All WBS Tasks were moved out of the WBS project, so the WBS project was deleted.")
Construction Developer: Update WBS on Sale Order confirm

uom_hour = env['uom.uom'].browse(4) for record in records: # when a SO is confirmed: use the default field sale_line_id # when a SO is NOT confirmed, use x_sale_line_id otherwise the SO is automatically confirmed
line_field = 'sale_line_id' if (confirmed := record.state != 'draft') else 'x_sale_line_id'
# PROJECT # if SO already confirmed: potential projects already created
if not (project := record.project_id): project = env['project.project'].search([('sale_order_id', '=', record.id)], limit=1) if not project: project = env['project.project'].create({ 'name': env._(f"{record.name} WBS - {record.partner_id.name}"), 'partner_id': record.partner_id.id, 'company_id': record.company_id.id, 'allow_timesheets': True, 'allow_billable': True, } | ({} if not confirmed else {'sale_order_id': record.id})) # If SO already confirmed but no project exists, we need to link the SO if not record.project_id: record['project_id'] = project.id
record['x_wbs_project'] = project.id
# Create default stages for new projects if not project.type_ids: # By default: takes the default stages defined in the construction module default_stage_ids = [env.ref(f'construction.planning_project_stage_{id}', raise_if_not_found=False).id for id in [0,1,2,3,4]] default_stages = env['project.task.type'].search([('id', 'in', default_stage_ids)]) # If they don't exist, create a new default stage if not default_stages: default_stage_ids = env['project.task.type'].create([ {'name': name, 'sequence': sequence, 'fold': fold, 'project_ids': False, 'color': color} for name, sequence, fold, color in [ (env._('New'), 1, False, 2), (env._('Planned'), 5, False, 3), (env._('In Progress'), 10, False, 4), (env._('Done'), 20, True, 10), (env._('Cancelled'), 25, True, False), ]]) project['type_ids'] = default_stages.ids
parent_lvl1, parent_lvl2 = False, False current_day_offset = 0 for line in record.order_line: clean_name = (line.name or '').split('\n')[0].strip() item_num = line.x_reference or '' task_values = { 'name': env._(f"{item_num} {clean_name}"), 'project_id': project.id, 'company_id': record.company_id.id, 'stage_id': project.type_ids[0].id, line_field: line.id, 'user_ids': False, }
if not line.x_wbs_ready: # SECTIONS if line.display_type == 'line_section': line['is_service'] = True parent_lvl1 = env['project.task'].create(task_values) parent_lvl2 = False # SUBSECTIONS elif line.display_type == 'line_subsection': line['is_service'] = True parent_lvl2 = env['project.task'].create(task_values | {'parent_id': parent_lvl1.id}) # PRODUCTS elif line.product_id: allocated_hours = 0 if not line.x_line_work_item_id: # Ignore everything except work items continue
wils = line.x_line_work_item_id.x_work_item_line_ids for comp in wils.filtered(lambda wil: wil.x_cost_nature == 'labour'): if comp.x_unit_id == uom_hour or comp.x_unit_id.relative_uom_id == uom_hour: allocated_hours += comp.x_unit_id._compute_quantity(comp.x_quantity, uom_hour) allocated_hours = line.product_uom_qty * allocated_hours
planned_start = datetime.date.today() + datetime.timedelta(days=current_day_offset) vals = { 'allocated_hours': allocated_hours, 'planned_date_begin': planned_start, 'date_deadline': planned_start + datetime.timedelta(hours=1), } if parent_lvl1 or parent_lvl2: vals['parent_id'] = parent_lvl2.id if parent_lvl2 else parent_lvl1.id
task = env['project.task'].create(task_values | vals) line.x_line_work_item_id['x_task_id'] = task.id
current_day_offset += 1 line['x_wbs_ready'] = True record.message_post(body=f"WBS setup in project.")
Construction Developer: Task - Update parent task dates & time
